response:
Task  
Guest name is Stefan Müller, company is in2code in Rosenheim, specializes in internet and intranet solutions and web applications based on TYPO3. Guest applies for the position of Auszubildender zum Fachinformatiker für Anwendungsentwicklung. Guest was noticed by Florian Bröcker. Guest has been interested in IT since childhood and has done small hobby projects in Python. Guest was born on 12.12.1999, has no real professional experience, no education. Guest has a business school diploma, dropped out of the Fachoberschule, dropped out of the Verschule for the Abitur.
